title: BluePack+
description: A Fabric Vanilla+ modpack for your SMP
body: # BluePack+ This modpack tweaks Minecraft Survival with performance, a better gameplay experience, and some cosmetic mods. The modpack has performance mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), cosmetic mods like [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) and mods with practical use like [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort), [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) and [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) for talking ingame with your friends if it is also installed on the server. ### ⚠️ Warning: Please don't use this pack on public servers ⚠️ Because a few mods are bannable, for example: - [**Freecam (Modrinth Edition)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - [**Xaero's Minimap**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) ### Features to mention - Voice Chat - [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) - X - Mute - N - Disable voice chat - - - Voice chat menue - Sort - [Client Sort](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsort) - MMB - Sort chest - Map - [Xaeros's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map), [Xaeros's Mini Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - M - Open World Map - Y - Enlarge Minimap - B - New Waypoint - U - Open Waypoint screen - Shaders - [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - K - Toggle Shaders - Ö - Reload Shaders - [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) - , - Toggle Gamma - . - Toggle Night Vision - Light level Overlay - [MiniHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) - F9 - Toggle light level Overlay - [Freelook](https://modrinth.com/mod/freelook) - R - look around your player - [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - F4 - Fly out of your player - Zoom - [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - C - Zoom (Hold) ### Gameplay picture
